creator: KOT@MATPOCKuH.Ru
text:
I'm tried to install qemu-tools using "make install FLAVOR=tools" from emulators/qemu directory and got same problem:
===>  Installing for qemu-tools-9.0.1
===>  Checking if qemu-tools is already installed
===>   Registering installation for qemu-tools-9.0.1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/ar:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/bepo:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/cz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/da:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/de:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/de-ch:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/en-gb:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/en-us:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/es:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work-tools/stage/usr/local/share/qemu/keymaps/et:No such file or directory
...

Deleting all %%DATADIR%%/keymaps/ entries from pkg-plist-tools solves the problem.
